hero.title: Cloud — a client that reads the game
hero.subtitle: Smooth Liquid Glass interface, clean bypasses, thoughtful modules. Built for people who care about quality.

features.title: Why Cloud
features.f1_d: Top-tier yet affordable legit software — clean, working features with no overpaying and no needless flags.
features.f2_d: Careful rotations, movement correction, behavior tuned for popular anti-cheats. No needless flags.
features.f3_d: Custom elements: binds, target HUD, armor, totems, media player — all draggable and scalable.
features.f4_d: Support for current versions, fast fixes, an open channel with changelogs.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Pick the term that fits you — from a trial day to lifetime access.

buy.title: Checkout
buy.need_login: Please log in or sign up to complete the purchase.
buy.note: After payment the key appears in your account. Refunds follow the refund policy.
buy.order_created: Order created. This is a demo payment flow.
buy.trial_desc: Trial period — once per account. Pick the length with the slider.
buy.trial_used: The trial period has already been used on this account.
buy.frozen_desc: You can place a pre-order now — message us and we'll lock in your plan and grant access as soon as sales reopen. Granted days are not being spent meanwhile.
buy.frozen_flash: Purchases are temporarily frozen — place a pre-order.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Manage your account settings
account.avatar_err: Could not upload avatar (image up to 6 MB required).

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: Didn't find an answer? Write to us — we reply fast.
support.q1: How do I install the client?
support.a1: Download the .jar from your account, drop it into the mods folder next to Fabric Loader for 1.21.11, and launch via the Fabric profile.
support.a2: The main version right now is 1.21.11. Support for newer versions is added as they release.
support.a3: Any third-party software carries risk. We keep bypasses careful, but no one can guarantee safety.
support.a4: Within the period in the refund policy if the client is technically non-functional. See the Refund Policy for details.
support.name: Name

flash.err_pass_short: Password must be at least 6 characters.
